formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear [Professional Association Name] Membership Committee,

I am writing to apply for membership as a Corporate Member with [Professional Association Name]. My name is Oliver Smith, and I hold a Master's in Business Administration. With over 10 years of experience in the field, I currently serve as the Operations Manager at Global Corp.

I believe that joining [Professional Association Name] will provide me with valuable networking opportunities, access to industry resources, and professional development support. As a Corporate Member, I am committed to contributing to the community and advancing the goals and values of the association.

I was referred to [Professional Association Name] by Anna Johnson, whose contact information is provided below for reference:

Reference: 
Name: Anna Johnson
Contact: anna.johnson@example.com

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to connect with like-minded professionals, share knowledge and best practices, and stay current on industry trends. I am confident that my background and expertise will be a valuable addition to the association, and I look forward to the possibility of membership.

Thank you for considering my application. I am eager to become an active member of [Professional Association Name] and contribute positively to the association's mission.

Sincerely,
Oliver Smith
Email: oliver.smith@example.com
Phone: 555-2020
Date of Birth: 1988-02-15.
